title: Silky Smooth Middle Eastern Chestnut Mushroom Labneh
description: A fresh and creamy Middle Eastern dish featuring chestnut mushroom, served in a cazuela, this labneh is a perfect blend of flavors and textures, gluten-free-friendly and indulgent.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the labneh cheese, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the sliced chestnut mushrooms until they are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Stir the cooked mushroom mixture into the labneh cheese mixture.
Arrange the leaf wraps in a large cazuela, overlapping them to cover the bottom.
Spoon the labneh and mushroom mixture into the center of the leaf wraps.
Fold the leaf wraps over the filling to create a tight packet.
Steam the packet over boiling water for 10 minutes.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and mint.
